title: JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR)
short_info: The latest Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Research Associate posts! Published on 18 May 2026 at JNCASR Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 1 opening for eligible candidates. Applicants within the maximum 35 years age limit and possessing a Ph.D. in Physics / Chemistry can apply through email mode up to 01-06-2026. Find all details about the JNCASR Research Associate new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, application process, and notification PDF here.

qualification.details: Ph.D. in Physics / Chemistry. Those who have submitted their Ph.D. thesis may also apply. Candidate should have at least two research papers in Science Citation Index (SCI) Journal. Desirable: Expertise in the synthesis of halide perovskite-based materials for emerging applications; Expertise in temperature-dependent dielectric, ferroelectric and electrical transport property studies; Expertise in Raman spectroscopy, microscopy, and group theoretical analysis; Expertise in DFT and finite element simulations; Extensive research experience in the field of optoelectronics and materials science.

selection_process: Shortlisting Online Interview Technical Discussion Personal Interaction
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JNCASR Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 01-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Physics or Chemistry. Those who have submitted their Ph.D. thesis are also eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 58,000/- per month, plus 27% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the JNCASR Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What are the desirable qualifications for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: Desirable qualifications include expertise in halide perovskite synthesis, dielectric/ferroelectric studies, Raman spectroscopy, DFT simulations, and optoelectronics/materials science research experience.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications, followed by an online interview, technical discussion, and personal interaction.

faq.question: Q9. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Research Associate position at JNCASR.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
